title: Iran Just Bombed an American Ally's Backyard
script: Iran just bombed an ally. IRGC ballistic missiles slammed into Bahrain, home of the US Navy's Fifth Fleet, and hit a Kuwaiti airbase in the same wave. Drones reached residential Manama, wounding an eleven-year-old girl in her own neighborhood. Bahrain and Kuwait both condemned the strikes and called emergency sessions of parliament. US CENTCOM launched retaliatory strikes on IRGC radar and missile sites within hours. This is the first direct Iranian strike on a Gulf Cooperation Council member's soil in modern history. It was supposed to be a pressure campaign, but missiles hitting civilian neighborhoods changes every calculation. Peace talks that were quietly happening in Oman have now collapsed. So at what point does this stop getting worse?

shots.phrase: IRGC missiles targeting the Navy Fifth Fleet
Kuwaiti airbase and Kuwait condemn the attacks
first direct Iranian strike on Gulf soil
Peace talks in Oman have collapsed

punches.phrase: Peace talks in Oman have collapsed
